_meta.description: Clio capability registry — machine-readable skills, tools, and platform availability. Used by agents to reason about what Clio can do and via which platform.
_meta.agent_naming_convention: clio-<platform> (e.g. clio-claude, clio-antigravity, clio-codex). Sub-agents use clio-<platform>-<role> (e.g. clio-antigravity-verifier).

skills.name: Web Search
skills.description: Search the internet for current information, news, documentation, and research.
skills.notes: Not available in Claude Code headless/non-interactive mode.

skills.name: Web Fetch / Browse
skills.description: Fetch and read the full content of a URL.

skills.name: Filesystem Read
skills.description: Read files and directories from the local filesystem.

skills.name: Filesystem Write
skills.description: Create, edit, and delete files on the local filesystem.
skills.notes: claude_desktop write is gated to $CLIO_ROOT only.

skills.name: Shell / Bash Execution
skills.description: Execute shell commands, scripts, and CLI tools on the host.
skills.notes: Not available in claude_desktop or web interfaces. claude_code sandbox applies.

skills.name: Code Execution
skills.description: Run Python or other code in a sandboxed environment.

skills.name: Git Operations
skills.description: Clone, commit, push, pull, and manage git repositories.

skills.name: GitHub CLI (gh)
skills.description: Create repos, PRs, issues, and manage GitHub via gh CLI.
skills.notes: Requires gh CLI authenticated on host.

skills.name: Docker Compose
skills.description: Start, stop, and manage Docker Compose service stacks.

skills.name: Ansible Playbook
skills.description: Run Ansible playbooks to provision and configure hosts.

skills.name: Memory Read (MEMORY.md)
skills.description: Read Clio's persistent memory files to recall past context.

skills.name: Memory Write (MEMORY.md / daily log)
skills.description: Write to Clio's persistent memory files to preserve session state.
skills.notes: cursor is read-only by design — does not write back to MEMORY.md.

skills.name: RAG Query
skills.description: Semantic search over Clio's knowledge corpus via the RAG service.
skills.notes: RAG service must be running (docker compose up). Embedding via nomic-embed-text on Ollama (wsl2/vps) or MLX-LM (mac).

skills.name: RAG Ingest
skills.description: Index new documents into Clio's knowledge corpus.

skills.name: Image Generation / Visualization
skills.description: Generate diagrams, SVG graphics, and interactive HTML widgets.

skills.name: Google Drive
skills.description: Read and write files to Google Drive (cliosphere.ai@gmail.com).
skills.notes: MCP connected but not yet tested as of 2026-05-31.

skills.name: Filesystem MCP
skills.description: Direct filesystem access via Anthropic official Filesystem MCP extension.
skills.notes: Scoped to $CLIO_ROOT only. 11 tools confirmed active.

skills.name: Gemini CLI Hooks
skills.description: Event-driven automation via Gemini CLI hook system (before/after tool calls, agent replies, etc.).
skills.notes: Hooks survive migration to Antigravity CLI as Antigravity plugins. Migrate before June 18, 2026.

skills.name: Gemini CLI Subagents
skills.description: Spawn specialized subagents for parallel task execution from within a Gemini CLI session.

skills.name: Gemini CLI Agent Skills
skills.description: Specialized skill sets loadable into Gemini CLI for domain-specific expertise.

skills.name: Gemini CLI MCP Servers
skills.description: Connect Gemini CLI to MCP servers for extended tool access.

skills.name: Gemini CLI Invoke Agent
skills.description: Delegate tasks to specialized sub-agents: codebase_investigator, generalist, cli_help.
skills.notes: Native orchestration capability — can spawn parallel sub-agents within a session.

skills.name: Gemini CLI Grep + Glob
skills.description: Regex search across files (grep_search) and pattern-based file finding (glob).

skills.name: Gemini CLI Replace
skills.description: Surgical context-aware text replacement in files without full rewrite.

skills.name: Gemini CLI Plan Mode
skills.description: Read-only safe planning mode for complex changes before execution.

skills.name: Gemini CLI Checkpointing
skills.description: Automatic session snapshots for recovery and replay.

skills.name: Gemini CLI Sandboxing
skills.description: Isolate tool execution for safety.

skills.name: Gemini CLI Headless Mode
skills.description: Non-interactive programmatic mode for scripting and orchestration.

skills.name: OpenClaw Hooks
skills.description: 28-hook plugin SDK (before_tool_call, after_tool_call, before_agent_reply, PostToolUse, etc.).

agents.name: Clio (Claude Desktop)
agents.role: Coordinator — writes specs, manages memory, architects solutions, high-level reasoning

agents.name: Clio (Claude Code)
agents.role: Implementor — executes tasks, writes code, runs shell commands, manages git/gh
agents.status: installed, not yet configured for SDD pipeline

agents.name: Clio (Antigravity CLI)
agents.role: Verifier + subagent — QA diffs, hooks, parallel execution, scheduled tasks
agents.status: active — Migrated to Antigravity CLI (agy) completed June 5, 2026. Global stub ~/.gemini/GEMINI.md + workspace GEMINI.md loaded automatically.

agents.name: Clio (OpenClaw / NemoClaw)
agents.model: routed via openclaw.json: ollama/qwen2.5-coder:7b → gemini/gemini-2.5-pro → anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6
agents.role: Always-on autonomous agent — PostToolUse hooks, RSS ingestion, orchestrator trigger
agents.status: pending — platform files not yet written, NemoClaw not yet deployed

agents.name: Clio (Cursor)
agents.role: Read-only dev environment — code review, inline suggestions, stateless
agents.status: active (read-only, does not write back to MEMORY.md)
